Incident Report — Cybersecurity and Operational Impact relating to ASX disclosure obligations
Warrinup Data Services Pty Ltd (ABN 78 904 532 619; ACN 812 371 906), Australia-based data processing and analytics provider
Date/Time: 02 Jun 2026 09:40 AEST; prepared for Corporations Act s674 and ASX Listing Rule 3.1 considerations
Primary contact: Ms Alina Gerrity, Company Secretary — alina.gerrity@warrinup.com.au — +61 2 9155 0843
On 31 May 2026, anomalous activity was detected on our HR and vendor portals; containment began within 90 minutes and OAIC Notifiable Data Breach steps commenced.
Exposed PII may include staff addresses, mobile numbers, TFNs, and AU passport scans (example: Mr Darius Kelm — TFN 745 839 512; Passport No: AU-KK1982457); health assessment forms were accessed for pre-employment checks.
Two supplier bank records were viewed: Redgum Analytics Pty Ltd — BSB 823-119, Account 19482573; Corktree Logistics Pty Ltd — BSB 734-002, Account 66791304.
Concurrent access occurred to internal board materials containing non-public Q4 EBITDA guidance and an unsigned termination notice from Fernhaven Energy Co‑op; this is inside information (MNPI) not generally available under Corporations Act s1042A.
ESG datasets (emissions intensity tables and draft scope 2 reconciliation) for our 2026 Sustainability Update were also accessed and are not yet public.
A trading halt request was lodged with ASX pending verification of data integrity and to manage potential market impact; ASIC has been notified of suspected unauthorised access to MNPI.
Registered office: Level 21, 360 Hinkler Street, Parramatta NSW 2150; vendor inquiries via vendor.support@warrinup.com.au.
A phishing lure cited “ACN 123 456 789” and a public helpline 1300 000 000; recipients should disregard those details as they appeared in the hoax message.
Some attachments included generic form labels (“Applicant Name:”, “Passport No:”, “TFN:”) and role-only references (“the CFO”, “the HR Administrator”) rather than named signatories.
Customer support FAQs remained available; no biometric data is collected or stored by Warrinup systems.
For employees seeking assistance, contact hr.care@warrinup.com.au or +61 4 6712 5584; media queries via press@warrinup.com.au.
We will issue an updated statement to ASX once forensic validation is complete and NDB notifications to affected individuals are ready.
